violations.text: The dish washer located in the back kitchen area was not in good repair. Sanitizing to be completed in three bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2025

Grout to the floor in the coffee/soda drive-thru area and 3 bay sink area is in poor condition with standing water. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024
